data.narrative:
OroraTech is a Series B space & aerospace company that has raised €38M+ to date. Valuation was assessed against a peer universe of 3 same-stage private companies in the Space & Aerospace sector: Cowboy Space Corporation ($2.0B), Aalyria ($1.3B), and Hubble Network ($400M).

The peer-median method was the applicable triangulation approach given available data. The median valuation across these three comparables is $1.3B, with a peer range spanning $400M to $2.0B. Public-comp anchoring was not feasible because OroraTech's revenue was not disclosed; while the Space & Aerospace public market (6 tickers including RKLB, PL, LUNR, ASTS, SATL) trades at a median P/S of 64.2x, applying this multiple requires known revenue figures.

The analysis supports a valuation range of $1.1B to $1.5B, with a median estimate of $1.3B. This range reflects uncertainty around where OroraTech sits relative to its peers on operational maturity and market position within the broader space sector. The primary limitation is reliance on a single methodology; triangulation strength would improve with disclosed revenue or additional comparable transactions. Key uncertainties include the target's specific technology differentiation, customer traction, and path to revenue relative to the peer set.
